basic_details.job_title: Sainik School Chhingchhip Mizoram Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for TGT, Counsellor and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: TGT Social Science, General Employee, Counsellor, PEM/PTI-cum-Matron
basic_details.short_information: Sainik School Chhingchhip Mizoram TGT Social Science, General Employee, Counsellor, PEM/PTI-cum-Matron Notification 2026 has been released on the official website sschhingchhip.mizoram.gov.in. A total of 6 vacancies have been announced through the Sainik School Chhingchhip Mizoram Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 50 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Four years integrated degree course from NCTE recognized university with at least 50% marks, Bachelors/ Honours Degree with at least 50% marks, B.Ed Degree from NCTE recognized Institution/University with at least 50% marks, Three years integrated B.Ed.-M.Ed from NCTE recognized Institution with atleast 50% marks, One year B.Ed. (Special Education) from Rehabilitation Council of India (RCI) with atleast 50% marks, Qualified in the Central Teacher Eligibility Test (Paper –II), Class X/Matriculation or equivalent, Graduate / Post Graduate in Psychology, Post Graduate in Childs Development, Graduate /Post Graduate with Diploma in Career Guidance and Counselling, Bachelor of Physical Education (B.P.Ed), Three Years Graduation + One Year B.P.Ed Diploma, B.Sc Physical Education : Health Education and Sports + One Year B.P.Ed Diploma
qualification.details: TGT Social Science: Four years integrated degree course from NCTE recognized university with at least 50% marks in the concerned subject as well as in the aggregated including B.Ed component OR Bachelors/ Honours Degree from a recognized university with at least 50% marks in concerned subjects, combination of subjects and also in aggregate AND B.Ed Degree from NCTE recognized Institution/University with at least 50% marks OR Three years integrated B.Ed.-M.Ed from NCTE recognized Institution with atleast 50% marks OR One year B.Ed. (Special Education) from Rehabilitation Council of India (RCI) with atleast 50% marks. Qualified in the Central Teacher Eligibility Test (Paper –II) conducted by the Government of India. Competence to teach through English & Hindi languages. Studied any two subjects out of History, Geography, Economics and Political Science during graduation out of which one must be either History or Geography in at least 03 years/ 06 semesters of course as an Elective/Main Subject and the second subject for at least one year/any two semesters of the course. General Employee: Should have passed Class X/Matriculation or equivalent from a recognized Board. Knowledge of all types of general work including gardener, cook, housekeeping, maintenance, cleaning, sweeping, mason, plumber, electrician, carpenter etc. Counsellor: Graduate / Post Graduate in Psychology OR Post Graduate in Childs Development OR Graduate /Post Graduate with Diploma in Career Guidance and Counselling. PEM/PTI-cum-Matron (Female): Bachelor of Physical Education (B.P.Ed) Four Years Degree Course OR Three Years Graduation + One Year B.P.Ed Diploma OR B.Sc Physical Education : Health Education and Sports + One Year B.P.Ed Diploma.

salary_details.details: TGT Social Science: Level 7 General Employee: Level 1 Counsellor: Rs 71,840 PEM/PTI-cum-Matron (Female): Rs 71,840

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Sainik School Chhingchhip Mizoram Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Sainik School Chhingchhip Mizoram Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: TGT Social Science: Four years integrated degree course from NCTE recognized university with at least 50% marks in the concerned subject as well as in the aggregated including B.Ed component OR Bachelors/ Honours Degree from a recognized university with at least 50% marks in concerned subjects, combination of subjects and also in aggregate AND B.Ed Degree from NCTE recognized Institution/University with at least 50% marks OR Three years integrated B.Ed.-M.Ed from NCTE recognized Institution with atleast 50% marks OR One year B.Ed. (Special Education) from Rehabilitation Council of India (RCI) with atleast 50% marks. Qualified in the Central Teacher Eligibility Test (Paper –II) conducted by the Government of India. Competence to teach through English & Hindi languages. Studied any two subjects out of History, Geography, Economics and Political Science during graduation out of which one must be either History or Geography in at least 03 years/ 06 semesters of course as an Elective/Main Subject and the second subject for at least one year/any two semesters of the course. General Employee: Should have passed Class X/Matriculation or equivalent from a recognized Board. Knowledge of all types of general work including gardener, cook, housekeeping, maintenance, cleaning, sweeping, mason, plumber, electrician, carpenter etc. Counsellor: Graduate / Post Graduate in Psychology OR Post Graduate in Childs Development OR Graduate /Post Graduate with Diploma in Career Guidance and Counselling. PEM/PTI-cum-Matron (Female): Bachelor of Physical Education (B.P.Ed) Four Years Degree Course OR Three Years Graduation + One Year B.P.Ed Diploma OR B.Sc Physical Education : Health Education and Sports + One Year B.P.Ed Diploma.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Sainik School Chhingchhip Mizoram Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Sainik School Chhingchhip Mizoram Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Sainik School Chhingchhip Mizoram Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the Sainik School Chhingchhip Mizoram Recruitment 2026 is 03-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies announced for various posts including TGT Social Science, General Employee, Counsellor, and PEM/PTI-cum-Matron in Sainik School Chhingchhip Mizoram Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for these posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Sainik School Chhingchhip Mizoram Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for all posts is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 50 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the TGT Social Science post?
faq.answer: For TGT Social Science, candidates need a four years integrated degree course or a Bachelor's/Honours Degree with B.Ed, along with CTET Paper-II qualification and specific subject combinations studied during graduation.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the General Employee post?
faq.answer: The General Employee post is offered a salary as per Level 1 of the pay matrix.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for SC/ST candidates for the Sainik School Chhingchhip Mizoram Recruitment 2026. General/OBC candidates need to pay Rs. 500/-.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these government jobs?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Sainik School Chhingchhip Mizoram Recruitment 2026 typically involves a Written Exam followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Sainik School Chhingchhip Mizoram. The link will be provided in the Important Links section.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates apply through online mode?
faq.answer: No, the application mode for this recruitment is strictly offline. Candidates must submit their applications by post to the address mentioned in the official notification.
